title: Review gate evidence is missing immutable artifact version
scope: A review gate cannot approve a public artifact until the artifact version is recorded as a commit or content hash.
blocker_cause: The review record references a mutable working tree without a pre-commit reason.
next_action: Record a commit SHA or sha256 content hash, then rerun the review gate.
unblock_condition: Review gate has immutable artifact_version and reviewer verdict is current.
